# One Platform. Infinite Possibilities

#### Agents. RAG. Fine-Tuning. All in One Place.

Forget complexity. THub gives you everything you need to build powerful GenAI workflows—without writing a single line of code.

#### Drag. Drop. Done.

Your ideas. Your flow. Your way. No-code. Low-code. No limits. Design apps visually—just drag, drop, and deploy.

![automated data pipeline](https://thub.tech/assets/pipe_lite-CU6vYrxM.svg)

#### Turn Data Into Decisions.

Structured.  Semi-Structured.  Unstructured. With THub’s automated data pipeline, your data flows where it matters—into action.

Try a demo

Features 1

### Drag. Drop. Deploy.

#### Create in Minutes. No Code Required.

Build AI apps with the speed of thought. Just drag what you need—LLMs, agents, chains, embedding models, or voice agents—and drop it into place

- From prototype to production in record time

- Intuitive canvas interface

- Voice-to-text and text-to-voice features baked in


#### Think it. Build it. Ship it.

Get Started Free

![gif](https://thub.tech/assets/feature_first-2-CgjF-nI-.gif)

![gif](https://thub.tech/assets/feature_second-2-B2nnrrgu.gif)

Features 2

### Smarter Data. Sharper Apps.

#### Harness the Power of Vector Search and Voice Intelligence.

Pinecone. Faiss. Weaviate. Qdrant. All integrated. All blazing fast.

- Real-time semantic and voice search and discovery

- Lightning-fast document, voice, and media retrieval

- Efficient similarity search across text, audio, and images


#### From raw data to real insight—THub delivers.

Get Started Free

Features 3

### From Idea to Intelligence. Instantly.

#### Versatile. Scalable. Effortless. Voice-Enabled.

THub powers it all—chatbots, document processors, voice agents, recommendation engines, customer copilots, and more.

- Build Retrieval-Augmented Generation apps in clicks

- Fine-tune models using RAFT workflows

- Automate data preprocessing, voice transcription, and orchestration


#### One platform. Infinite potential.

Get Started Free

Free Forever

₹0

For starters: one user, 3 agents, endless potential.

Start Free

- Single User
- 3 Agents
- API based access to LLM
- Embedding Model
- Vector Database
- Bring your own API key
- Basic Analytics
- Standard Support

Pro Power

₹ 19,999/agent

For teams: 5 users, 10 agents, tools to scale.

Choose Plan

- All Free Features
- 5 Users
- 25 Agents
- ₹ 17,999/per Additional Agents
- Team collaboration

- Fine Tune open source LLM

### −

### What is THub?

Your gateway to AI apps. Drag, drop, and deploy—innovation, simplified.

### +

### For Non-Coders

Yes. From beginners to pros, THub welcomes all.

### +

### What Makes THub Different?

Simplicity with strength. Speed with sophistication.

### +

### What Can You Build

Chatbots. Recommenders. Summaries. Anything you imagine.

### +

### For Every Business?

Startups to giants—THub grows with you.
